name: Adversarial re-review
_source: PART0 STEP 10 / PART3 §10; ONE-SHOT-SHELL §6 (★). Reads pipeline outputs (funnel-brief + copy + chief-verdicts + asset-records as the evidence manifest; PART0 STEP 8b: copy feeds the re-review); review/ is the terminal deliverable. audit-inject/audit-resolve = engine audit-tooling bricks (MANIFEST-04).
